name: Niut
short_description: Niut is kidnapped and sent to an unknown planet (Anthara), where she will have to survive alongside other people who share the same destiny, fight against powerful enemies of other morphologies and delve into the mysteries hidden in this new stellar wasteland.
detailed_description:
Overview:

Niut is kidnapped and sent to an unknown planet (Anthara), where she will have to survive alongside other people who share the same destiny, fight against powerful enemies of other morphologies and delve into the mysteries hidden in this new stellar wasteland.

Gameplay:

This demo is available in Spanish until further updates. You will encounter a third-person environment (camera behind the main character) and a user-friendly UI that fits the atmosphere of the game's story. On the left side is the sprint bar, on the right side the energy and ammo meters, and at the top is the drop-down inventory bar ("I") and a compass for future directions.

Controls:

AWSD: Move

Left Shift: Sprint

Spacebar: Jump

Control: Crouch

1 to 6: Weapons (When held)

0: No weapons

Left Click: Aim

Right Click: Shoot

Tab: Mission Box

C: Read text

] : Console

"," "." : Camera Left/Right

0 (During stage selection): Change location

Enter (During stage selection): Select stage

ESC: Options

Design:

Niut is an open-world action video game created by AF Works ®, created and published under the Unity graphics engine by Unity Technologies in 2025.

General production by Alan Farias.

Localization:

Spanish and English (In progress).
